summary: First-pass full-stack testing of Locked Angle Supply Co. ecommerce app. Backend pytest suite (15 tests) all pass: products listing/filtering/featured/categories/slug lookup with 404, order create/get with empty-cart and validation rejections, contact create with validation. Frontend Playwright E2E: home hero+marquee+featured+brand+banner+footer, nav routes, shop grid (12 products) and category filter (TEES=3), product detail page with size-required error, add-to-cart opens drawer, qty +/- works, checkout form submits valid order returning LA-XXXXXXXX number, contact form shows success toast, about page renders, mobile hamburger menu toggles. All critical flows working.

issues: Headline renders as 'BUILT FORTHE SIDEWAYS' (missing space between FOR and THE due to line-break/markup) — verify intended typography; visually a small space appears in screenshot but text_content shows concatenation

action_items: Optional: confirm hero headline 'BUILT FOR THE SIDEWAYS' renders with proper word spacing (text_content concatenates as 'BUILT FORTHE SIDEWAYS').
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') — migrate to lifespan context manager for forward compatibility (not blocking).
Checkout testids are mixed (checkout-fullname/email/address1/zip/country) — naming is fine but document for next testing agent so they don't guess checkout-full_name.
All endpoints correctly exclude MongoDB _id via projection ({'_id': 0}). Good.
Order_number generation uses uuid4 hex[:8] — collision probability negligible at 12-product scale, acceptable for mock checkout.
Pydantic EmailStr correctly validates email format (verified by tests).
Frontend uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exclusively — no hardcoded URLs.
test_credentials: N/A — guest checkout only, no auth in the app.
seed_data_creation: Created during tests: 1 order (LA-CC14B602 in DB) + 1 TEST_ contact message + 1 additional TEST order from backend tests. Safe; not user-facing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Checkout form testids: checkout-fullname, checkout-email, checkout-phone, checkout-address1, checkout-address2, checkout-city, checkout-state, checkout-zip, checkout-country, checkout-notes, checkout-place-order, checkout-success, checkout-order-number, checkout-total. Seeded products include 12 items; product slug for tests: 'sideways-heavyweight-tee'. Product detail enforces size selection (shows 'Choose a size' error) unless size is ONE SIZE. Cart persists in localStorage so reloading /checkout keeps items. Sonner toasts appear with selector [data-sonner-toast]. Backend at https://locked-angle-shop.preview.emergentagent.com/api.
